2017November 5, 2017

🇰🇷 Jeju, Korea

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Jeju, Korea, November 5, 2017 -- November 10, 2017

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2017-11-jeju-korea

16 Resolutions

965Plenary
Establish WG 16 for Formats for Visualization
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to create WG 16 with the following title and scope Title: Formats for Visualization and other derived forms of product data Scope: * Develop and maintain format and in...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
964Plenary
Approve a NP to create a new edition 3 of ISO 10303-209
SC 4 approves a NP to create a new edition 3 of ISO 10303-209 with the same scope as ISO 10303-209 edition 2 “Multidisciplinary analysis and design”, using SDT48, with Jochen Haenisch as the projec...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
963Plenary
Establish Ballot Duration of the New Work Item for STEP geometry services
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for STEP geometry services.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
962Plenary
Establish Ballot Duration of the New Work Item for Digital Twin Manufacturing
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for ‘Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework’.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
961Plenary
Establish Ballot Duration of the New Work Item for ISO 8000-116
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for ISO 8000-116 on Authoritative Legal Entity Identifier (ALEI).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
960Plenary
Establish category D Liaison with the A&D PLM Action Group
SC 4 welcomes the application of the A&D PLM Action Group as a category D Liaison to WG 12 and WG 15.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
959Plenary
Appoint Liaison Officer to ISO/TC 154
SC 4 appoints Torbjorn Holm as Liaison Officer to ISO/TC 154 “Processes, data elements and documents in commerce, industry and administration” for a three year term with specific interest in the Va...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
958Plenary
Appoint Liaison Officer to ECCMA
SC 4 appoints Peter Eales as liaison officer to ECCMA for a three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
957Plenary
Reappoint JWG 08 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Bob Young as Deputy Convener for the JWG 08 “Joint ISO/TC 184/SC 4 - ISO/TC 184/SC 5 WG; Manufacturing process and management information” for a further three year term, with apprecia...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
956Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following Project Leaders and Project Editors for the associated Projects: |=== |Project |Working Group |Project Leader/Editor |8000-3 |WG13 |Aminata Mbengue (PL) |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

SC4 also thanks the Korean hosts for preparing a gift and cake to mark the occasion for Howard and his wife.

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
